The question is asking to determine which time period had the least deaths per year. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "deaths per year" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(deaths per year) operation. This will allow us to see the time periods ranked from the least to the most deaths per year.
The time period with the least deaths per year was 1950-1955, with 66,000 deaths per year.
